visual_description: A man peers through binoculars in a dark setting while another man watches nearby. The scene shifts to a small boat carrying four people moving across dark water with distant lights. Finally a close-up shows a man wearing headphones looking down at a device, followed by a view of an SMS message interface on a screen.
